channel.title: Disney Tips - bound.tips
channel.description: Daily Disney tips extracted from top YouTube channels

item.title: Use the server assistance at Polite Pig to order additional items after your initial counter orde...
item.description: Use the server assistance at Polite Pig to order additional items after your initial counter order, avoiding a second wait in line. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Ask if Gideon's Bakehouse has leftover buttercream frosting available for $1.50, as it's not adve...
item.description: Ask if Gideon's Bakehouse has leftover buttercream frosting available for $1.50, as it's not advertised but makes a great addition to cookies. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Do not refrigerate Gideon's Bakehouse cookies; store them at room temperature for 2-3 days or fre...
item.description: Do not refrigerate Gideon's Bakehouse cookies; store them at room temperature for 2-3 days or freeze for up to six months to maintain freshness. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: If Gideon's Bakehouse has a long wait, consider Summerhouse for a wide variety of well-made cooki...
item.description: If Gideon's Bakehouse has a long wait, consider Summerhouse for a wide variety of well-made cookies, bars, and treats with typically shorter lines. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Book a ride on an Amphicar at The Boathouse in Disney Springs, available to all guests regardless...
item.description: Book a ride on an Amphicar at The Boathouse in Disney Springs, available to all guests regardless of whether they are dining there. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Try the firecracker shrimp appetizer at The Boathouse for a highly recommended seafood starter.
item.description: Try the firecracker shrimp appetizer at The Boathouse for a highly recommended seafood starter. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Order the coriander-seared yellowfin tuna at The Boathouse if you enjoy rare-cooked fish with a f...
item.description: Order the coriander-seared yellowfin tuna at The Boathouse if you enjoy rare-cooked fish with a flavorful seared exterior and citrus notes. (Source: MammothClub)

item.title: Walt Disney World has three theaters for Soarin' Across America, offering higher capacity than Di...
item.description: Walt Disney World has three theaters for Soarin' Across America, offering higher capacity than Disneyland's two theaters. (Source: ProvostParkPass)

item.title: Try the donuts at Joffrey's in Epcot, especially those near Cosmic Rewind, as they are warm, soft...
item.description: Try the donuts at Joffrey's in Epcot, especially those near Cosmic Rewind, as they are warm, soft, and delicious. (Source: ProvostParkPass)

item.title: Try the classic breakfast burrito at Smoke Jumpers Grill, which includes sausage, bacon, eggs, ch...
item.description: Try the classic breakfast burrito at Smoke Jumpers Grill, which includes sausage, bacon, eggs, cheddar, and hash browns with a spicy moahete salsa. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Consider the Black Cherry Tavern Cold Brew at Red Rose Tavern, a blend of chocolate cold brew wit...
item.description: Consider the Black Cherry Tavern Cold Brew at Red Rose Tavern, a blend of chocolate cold brew with a black cherry topper, for a delicious and potent drink. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: If you enjoy unique flavor combinations, try the Philly Cheesesteak Grilled Cheese from Pym Test ...
item.description: If you enjoy unique flavor combinations, try the Philly Cheesesteak Grilled Cheese from Pym Test Kitchen, featuring a pepper and onion grilled cheese steak topped with cheese sauce and crunchy 'funions'. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Try the Cajun Caesar Chicken POBoy at Royal Street Veranda; it's a chilled sandwich with chicken,...
item.description: Try the Cajun Caesar Chicken POBoy at Royal Street Veranda; it's a chilled sandwich with chicken, croutons, and Cajun dressing on a French roll. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Order the Jolly Holiday Combo at Jolly Holiday Bakery Cafe, which includes a toasted cheese sandw...
item.description: Order the Jolly Holiday Combo at Jolly Holiday Bakery Cafe, which includes a toasted cheese sandwich and tomato basil soup for a classic comfort food experience. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Try the Toffee Nut Cold Brew at Jolly Holiday Bakery Cafe, a mix of toffee nut syrup, vanilla foa...
item.description: Try the Toffee Nut Cold Brew at Jolly Holiday Bakery Cafe, a mix of toffee nut syrup, vanilla foam, and cold brew. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Arrive at the Plaza Inn by 11:53 AM to witness the rope drop ceremony and be among the first to e...
item.description: Arrive at the Plaza Inn by 11:53 AM to witness the rope drop ceremony and be among the first to enter. (Source: FreshBaked)

item.title: Utilize the quiet pool at your resort for a relaxing midday break away from the parks during the ...
item.description: Utilize the quiet pool at your resort for a relaxing midday break away from the parks during the summer. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Pack inflatable pool toys like beach balls and noodles for use at your resort, but note they are ...
item.description: Pack inflatable pool toys like beach balls and noodles for use at your resort, but note they are prohibited at Disney water parks. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Use magnetic hooks on Disney resort room doors, as many are metal, to hang items like purses, bag...
item.description: Use magnetic hooks on Disney resort room doors, as many are metal, to hang items like purses, bags, or sunglasses organizers. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Bring a collapsible laundry basket to keep your resort room tidy and to easily transport dirty cl...
item.description: Bring a collapsible laundry basket to keep your resort room tidy and to easily transport dirty clothes to the laundry facilities available at every Disney resort. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Consider packing laundry sheets or small detergent containers if you plan to do laundry at your r...
item.description: Consider packing laundry sheets or small detergent containers if you plan to do laundry at your resort, especially when flying to save space. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Consider purchasing inexpensive lightsabers at shops like Target or Amazon for around $10-$20 to ...
item.description: Consider purchasing inexpensive lightsabers at shops like Target or Amazon for around $10-$20 to avoid the much higher cost of official Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge lightsabers. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Organize outfits by day or by person into stacks or bags to easily grab what you need each mornin...
item.description: Organize outfits by day or by person into stacks or bags to easily grab what you need each morning, saving time and reducing rummaging through suitcases. (Source: PixieDustedMom)

item.title: Consider the new Piston Peak and Villains Land expansions at Magic Kingdom, Monstropolis at Holly...
item.description: Consider the new Piston Peak and Villains Land expansions at Magic Kingdom, Monstropolis at Hollywood Studios, and Pueblo Espironza in Animal Kingdom for future visits, with Pueblo Espironza slated for a 2027 opening. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: The Carousel of Progress at Magic Kingdom will close July 6th and reopen in 2027 with a remodeled...
item.description: The Carousel of Progress at Magic Kingdom will close July 6th and reopen in 2027 with a remodeled show featuring new decades and updated scenes. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: A fourth ferry boat, the Meg Gilbert Croftton, will join the Magic Kingdom fleet by 2027, offerin...
item.description: A fourth ferry boat, the Meg Gilbert Croftton, will join the Magic Kingdom fleet by 2027, offering additional transportation from the TTC. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: The deluxe dining plan will return to Disney World in 2027, offering one snack, one quick service...
item.description: The deluxe dining plan will return to Disney World in 2027, offering one snack, one quick service meal, and two table service meals per day, plus a resort refillable mug. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Level 999, an immersive futuristic arcade and entertainment center, is set to open in Disney Spri...
item.description: Level 999, an immersive futuristic arcade and entertainment center, is set to open in Disney Springs in Summer 2026. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Six Ravens, a new savory dining experience from the Gideon's Bakehouse team, will open in Disney ...
item.description: Six Ravens, a new savory dining experience from the Gideon's Bakehouse team, will open in Disney Springs this summer, featuring hand pies and other unique items. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: A new poutine stand, La Poutinari, is opening at Epcot outside the Canada Pavilion, offering clas...
item.description: A new poutine stand, La Poutinari, is opening at Epcot outside the Canada Pavilion, offering classic and twisted versions of the dish. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: The Lakeshore Lodge, a new Disney Vacation Club resort, will open in Summer 2027 near Magic Kingd...
item.description: The Lakeshore Lodge, a new Disney Vacation Club resort, will open in Summer 2027 near Magic Kingdom, celebrating nature with an artistic theme. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin in Magic Kingdom's Tomorrowland has reopened with new ride vehic...
item.description: Buzz Lightyear Space Ranger Spin in Magic Kingdom's Tomorrowland has reopened with new ride vehicles, improved blasters, and a new ride scene featuring a tutorial robot. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Rock and Roller Coaster Starring Aerosmith at Hollywood Studios has been re-themed to feature The...
item.description: Rock and Roller Coaster Starring Aerosmith at Hollywood Studios has been re-themed to feature The Muppets' Electric Mayhem, with a randomized soundtrack and new ride vehicle designs. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Try the new snack stand 'Food by Swedish Chef' at Hollywood Studios, offering items like churro d...
item.description: Try the new snack stand 'Food by Swedish Chef' at Hollywood Studios, offering items like churro drumsticks and limeade with popping pearls. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: The new Walt Disney Studios area in Hollywood Studios, which includes the Disney Junior Mickey Mo...
item.description: The new Walt Disney Studios area in Hollywood Studios, which includes the Disney Junior Mickey Mouse Clubhouse Live show, is now open in phases, with the Magic of Disney Animation building opening later this summer. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Soarin' Across America in Epcot's Land Pavilion features a patriotic overlay with views of US lan...
item.description: Soarin' Across America in Epcot's Land Pavilion features a patriotic overlay with views of US landmarks and a new musical arrangement; a similar overlay is coming to Disney California Adventure on July 2nd. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Magic Kingdom will present a specialty Independence Day fireworks show, 'Disney's Celebrate Ameri...
item.description: Magic Kingdom will present a specialty Independence Day fireworks show, 'Disney's Celebrate America,' on July 3rd, 4th, and 5th. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Bluey and Bingo are meeting guests at Animal Kingdom's Conservation Station as part of the 'Cool ...
item.description: Bluey and Bingo are meeting guests at Animal Kingdom's Conservation Station as part of the 'Cool Kids Summer' event, featuring Australian-themed games and meet-and-greets. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: At Magic Kingdom, Jesse's Roundup in Frontier Land (at the Diamond Horseshoe) is a 'Cool Kids Sum...
item.description: At Magic Kingdom, Jesse's Roundup in Frontier Land (at the Diamond Horseshoe) is a 'Cool Kids Summer' event with Toy Story characters for crafts and dancing, not a dining experience. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Visit Communicore Hall in Epcot during 'Cool Kids Summer' for Goofy's dance parties and games.
item.description: Visit Communicore Hall in Epcot during 'Cool Kids Summer' for Goofy's dance parties and games. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Try the Bluey-inspired 'Wackadoo Fruit Freeze' and 'Fairy Bread Cake' at Pizzafari in Animal King...
item.description: Try the Bluey-inspired 'Wackadoo Fruit Freeze' and 'Fairy Bread Cake' at Pizzafari in Animal Kingdom, and the pretzel sauces at Isle of Java. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Locate the viral cookie dough brownie ice cream sandwich at a concession stand on the right when ...
item.description: Locate the viral cookie dough brownie ice cream sandwich at a concession stand on the right when leaving Animal Kingdom's Discovery Island area for potentially shorter waits. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Get the 'Chip 'n' Dale Animade Sipper' with a pencil straw at a kiosk in the new Walt Disney Stud...
item.description: Get the 'Chip 'n' Dale Animade Sipper' with a pencil straw at a kiosk in the new Walt Disney Studios courtyard at Hollywood Studios. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Try the 'Puffer Pig Pasta' at Docking Bay 7 in Hollywood Studios for a spicy Star Wars-themed meal.
item.description: Try the 'Puffer Pig Pasta' at Docking Bay 7 in Hollywood Studios for a spicy Star Wars-themed meal. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Sample the 'Space Ranger Float' or 'Zurg Overload Shake' at Anti-Gravity's Galactic Goodies in Ma...
item.description: Sample the 'Space Ranger Float' or 'Zurg Overload Shake' at Anti-Gravity's Galactic Goodies in Magic Kingdom for Buzz Lightyear-themed treats. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Try the 'Chicken Goof-Ups' and 'Goof Troop Mac Snack' at the grab-and-go booth outside Communicor...
item.description: Try the 'Chicken Goof-Ups' and 'Goof Troop Mac Snack' at the grab-and-go booth outside Communicore Hall in Epcot during 'Cool Kids Summer'. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: The 'S'moron Across America' milkshake at Sunshine Seasons in Epcot is a unique blend of s'more a...
item.description: The 'S'moron Across America' milkshake at Sunshine Seasons in Epcot is a unique blend of s'more and chocolate frosty flavors. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Get the fried cheesecake on a stick with strawberry sauce at Blue Ribbon Corn Dogs at Boardwalk I...
item.description: Get the fried cheesecake on a stick with strawberry sauce at Blue Ribbon Corn Dogs at Boardwalk Inn for a rich and delicious dessert. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: Expect updated animatronics with a more polished look on the Frozen Ever After ride at Epcot's No...
item.description: Expect updated animatronics with a more polished look on the Frozen Ever After ride at Epcot's Norway Pavilion. (Source: DFBGuide)

item.title: The Garden View Lounge tea experience at Grand Floridian Resort has reopened with an Alice in Won...
item.description: The Garden View Lounge tea experience at Grand Floridian Resort has reopened with an Alice in Wonderland theme, offering themed afternoon tea towers and a children's option. (Source: DFBGuide)
